steps.title: Require an inner shift
steps.content: The claim says Mrs. Sommers experiences a shift in her sense of self because of clothing. The right quotation must show clothing causing an internal change in confidence or identity, not merely show shopping, looking at clothing, or thinking about family needs before the transformation.

steps.title: Reject quotations without a shift
steps.content: A describes her bargain-hunting habits before the shift. B shows her looking at boots but not changing inwardly. C shows her planning purchases for others. The remaining quotation links stockings, boots, and gloves to assurance, bearing, and belonging, which are exactly changes in self-perception. The answer is D.
